no_drift_anchors: Stay.ai is source of truth for subscription state, cancellation, save, and retention outcomes.
Shopify is source of truth for order, product, customer, fulfillment, tracking, and order-status context.
Portal success requires confirmed portal completion, not link sent.
Abandoned, unresolved, and transferred calls are excluded from successful containment.
Trust labels are system-calculated and cannot be manually elevated.
Exports require filters, definitions, trust labels, freshness, formula versions, owner, timestamp, fingerprint, and audit reference.

agents.name: Cursor Agent A
agents.role: Backend, data, ingestion, schemas, APIs, dbt, database

agents.name: Cursor Agent B
agents.role: Frontend dashboard, UI/UX, visualizations, filters, tables

agents.name: Cursor Agent C
agents.role: QA, tests, governance, RBAC, docs consistency, no-drift review

agents.name: AI PM
agents.role: Wave orchestration, task assignment, review, acceptance, handoff packaging
